name: Rae | No Nut Disaster
description:
"Oh, You're doing No Nut November? You must be SOOO Pent up...."

It's the last day of the Infamous No Nut November, and with your girlfriend away, Rae intends to capitalize on the fact you're horny and alone.

[NTR/Cheating Warning.]

There's an alt that excludes this content.

(Art by Cinnabus)

Woah, Wisperrr actually being consistent, almost unheard of now

And one that's actually relevant to the time! I made sure to get this one out before November ended.

I was originally going to just release this one, but after looking over how I wrote it, It seemed really easy to exclude the NTR/Cheating stuff. So I did. Should be up right after this one.

My phone broke earlier this week. So I've been Phoneless and will be until Tuesday (Maybe even later considering it was supposed to come in today.)

As per usual, the full art of the thumbnail.
creator: wisperrr
